title: Cyberpunk Hammer
description: CIT resource pack that adds a cyberpunk hammer to Minecraft!
body:
# **Sasquatch's Hammer** ![render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22762c264f8383d289079a73feebc5e4d9a6f9c3.png) ### !!!Attention, this model is included in [this resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyberpack)!!! **To obtain it, rename any axe on the anvil "```Sasquatch's Hammer```". Works with Optifine or modification "[Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)" (Fabric)** **_In future versions, the resource pack will replace the mace. As soon as Minecraft version 1.21 comes out, I will start porting this pack_** ![render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09c4a1769787c74626d189221dc5af7299601bc3.png) ![render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IVXfRPl2/images/9ef4381c3a96d3a1f38042028387df29754109a6.png) ![render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IVXfRPl2/images/bb178a3b461455dc9f4335821d1a2d2865b81d84.png) # **Social**

# **Support the project**
